programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police don't have a basis for comparison to match shoe impressions, blood drops and DNA evidence from a murder scene.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A church member gets gunned down after leaving choir practice; although witnesses see little and not much evidence exists, investigators learn that she had been having affairs for years.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a man perishes in a fire while working in his garage, his death is initially ruled an accident until a forensic odontologist changes the direction of the case.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Lack of evidence compels investigators to look beyond the obvious when a woman is beaten to death at her in-laws house.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man is found dead of an apparent suicide. But soon after, information emerges which reveals a much more menacing scenario.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young bride-to-be is gunned down in her own home. The attack is personal and as investigators start digging, they uncover the man she loved was living a lie.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Tara Munsey went missing after a work shift at a Virginia restaurant, and it is unknown if she ran away or if she was the victim of foul play.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An Ohio woman and her two daughters go missing while vacationing in Florida; their corpses are found floating in Tampa Bay with a handwritten note by one of the victims; putting it on five billboards helps them find the killer.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Four young adults are murdered in an affluent Texas neighborhood, with little evidence but two people walking by dressed in black.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young college student is found dead in her apartment and the autopsy rules the death a homicide by an unknown male suspect.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The killer removed the computer that links him to the murder of a woman and her soon-to-be ex-husband that he had met online.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A real estate developer is shot and his wife becomes the prime suspect, until the bullet is linked to a weapon reported missing 20 years ago.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A body is found stuffed into a suitcase forcing the police to search though the landfill for another missing victim.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A shooting victim mutters the name of her apparent assailant before dying, but fingerprint comparisons, handwriting analysis, ballistics and DNA testing show someone else close to home is the true killer.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman's story seemed far-fetched; she tells investigators that a man broke into her home wearing only underwear and gloves, killed her boyfriend and raped and terrorized her.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: CNN News Central (HLN)
programme.desc: The anchors share the latest stories about significant events that take place across the world and interview prominent figures.

programme.desc: The anchors share the latest stories about significant events that take place across the world and interview prominent figures.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A jeweler's search through old sales records helps police find likely suspects in the murder of elderly couple Edward Kowalzck and Gertrude Thompson.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A garbage bag leads police to a child's killer.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a young woman uncovers a tooth that helps police solve a crime without a body.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The sensitive nose of a forensic examiner sniffs out murder.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Discovering that an assault suspect is left-handed is crucial to a police investigation dating back 16 years.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Forensic scientists try to find a way to "lift" the serial number from a shotgun that's their only clue in a case.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigating the worst arson spree in U.S. history -- a rash of more than 75 fires near Seattle.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Computers aid the police and FBI in solving a string of crimes.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Using an anonymous letter and geographical profiling, investigators close in on a serial rapist, and a cleverly obtained DNA sample confirms their suspicions.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young boy has serious respiratory problems and his father shows signs of early Alzheimer's disease, a chance encounter with a stranger kicks off an investigation into the cause.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police in St. Petersburg, Fla., use cell phone mapping, wiretapping and a host of forensic evidence to find a surgeon's killer.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman wins her release after being imprisoned for allegedly killing her mother in a car fire.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A masked gunman kills two members of a family and wounds two others after they interrupt his burglary at their upscale suburban home.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A killer leaves equally incriminating evidence at the scene when he meticulously wipes away his fingerprint and shoe impressions.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a woman is found dead at a yacht club in California in an apparent case of love gone wrong, investigators discover her home life was as dramatic as films made in nearby Hollywood.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The brutal murder of a state park employee over $2,000 rattles her co-workers and tourists while leaving police to sift through hundreds of leads.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When evidence shows a woman's rape and murder, police must find the killer as well as the victim.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A week after a couple disappears from the beach, police get a mysterious lead from a robbery.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Fifteen years later, DNA technology leads to justice for a murdered woman and her savagely beaten 4-year-old daughter.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A quiet waitress who hasn't been to work in two days vanishes without a trace; police suspect a date gone wrong.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The search for a missing exotic dancer led police to an isolated 75-acre site where someone had been shot and cremated, thus destroying all evidence... almost; piece of a foot provided enough DNA for a genetic profile and positive ID.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After years of suffering domestic abuse, a young woman is found murdered in her bathtub; among numerous clues, a hamburger bun proves the most incriminating.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Evidence that includes threatening emails, a missing person and an abandoned truck lead police to a woman's suspected killer, but they don't have the victim's body.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman has an accidental fall down a flight of stairs and appears to have hit her head, but the lack of blood splatter and misplaced shoes lead police to believe the fall was staged.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman goes missing for a month with the only clues being a set of keys, a fingerprint and a code.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police discover a mask near the crime scene and hope that it leads to the killer of a funeral director.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A killer assaults a young mother in her home, but despite meticulous washing of the crime scene, a single hair remains to lead authorities to the culprit.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The investigation into the disappearance of flight attendant Helle Crafts leads to the murder conviction of her pilot husband.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Scientists and detectives use DNA to solve a string of rapes and murders.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police use DNA profiles of seed pods from a truck to catch a killer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police believe they have a serial rapist and murderer, but DNA testing and research leads to another arrest and conviction.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1976, 182 war veterans in Philadelphia become hospitalized with pneumonia-like symptoms and 29 die; the disease resurfaces every few years.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a wealthy Southern physician gets murdered with a baseball bat, his wife and a handyman become convicted of the crime.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1971, John List disappears after murdering his mother, wife and three children; he eludes the law for years until an age-scaled sculpture of the suspect and a true-crime TV program helps lead to his arrest in 1989.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An 11-year-old boy comes down with a fever and diarrhea after eating an undercooked burger; when his condition worsens, his mother drives him to a hospital and doctors discover E. coli destroying his body.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Florida police search for a serial rapist and murderer who left small red fibers on each of his 10 victims.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an English couple go missing, police suspect their son killed them and must rely on mud and blood samples found in the couple's two cars to find their bodies.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Experts attempt to discover the source of heavy fog on Highway I-75 in Tennessee, which caused a 99-car accident and 12 deaths.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a Delaware man's mother is found dead, he tells a story that's so improbable police think it can't possibly be true.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a terrifying search for a missing wife and baby, then becomes a manhunt for a killer who committed a horrific crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Authorities are able to apprehend a kidnapper because he allowed his victim to write a will on a telltale pad of paper.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Experts debate whether an apparent heart attack victim died from natural causes or alleged poisoning by his girlfriend.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a 12-year-old was found dead in her home, police were left clueless until a string of burglaries months later. A trail of stolen goods may help solve a murder.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When 15-year-old Marlene Miller was murdered, it would take 24 years and several retrials before forensic scientists discovered the evidence to bring her killer to justice.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Detectives use a forged signature to find a woman's abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is killed two days before she was scheduled to testify against a man accused of assaulting her and the prime suspect has an alibi.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A bite mark is all the evidence needed to convict a suspect who was robbing tourists in Florida.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Technology able to analyze human bite-marks yields information on a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A death in Pennsylvania is strikingly similar to one in North Carolina.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a nurse starts experiencing a variety of flu-like symptoms, she discovers that she is HIV-positive; she learns that her infection was not accidental.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Time of death becomes pivotal when a pregnant woman is found murdered in her air-conditioned bedroom.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An obscure print found at a crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman goes missing from her home, police focus on her husband when an airline luggage tag and luminol point to an affair and murder; footage from a TV crew and Coast Guard photographs lead investigators to the suspect's missing boat.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman exhibits strange flu-like symptoms before dying, investigators discover someone added thallium to her soda; detectives initially suspect her husband, but the case takes a sinister turn.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
